randomPrompts: A futuristic detective tracking down a rogue AI in a neon-drenched city where the boundary between virtual and reality has collapsed, and every suspect has a digital twin.
A retired dragon rider receives a mysterious egg that hatches into a creature not seen for a thousand years, drawing the attention of warring kingdoms and a secret society of mage-hunters.
In a world where dreams are mined as fuel, a young dreamwalker discovers a nightmare realm that threatens to consume both the sleeping and waking worlds.
A crew of scavengers finds an abandoned generation ship drifting between stars. Inside, time flows differently — and something has been waiting for visitors.
A street artist in near-future Tokyo discovers their graffiti portals actually open doorways to parallel dimensions, and a shadowy government agency will do anything to control them.
When the ocean begins to recede worldwide, revealing ancient underwater cities, a marine biologist and a deep-sea diver uncover a civilization that never went extinct.

A young stargazer in an ancient observatory discovers that shooting stars are messengers from a dying constellation seeking a new home, and she must help them find their place among the living stars before they fade forever.

In a bustling night market where vendors sell bottled dreams and bottled laughter, a kind-hearted pickpocket accidentally steals a dangerous nightmare and must return it to its owner before it spreads fear across the city.

A lonely robotic gardener on a planet covered in endless cities tends to the last surviving garden and befriends a mysterious seed that grows into a tree capable of healing the concrete world around it.

When a whimsical carnival materializes in a quiet suburban town overnight, its magical attractions grant wishes that teach valuable lessons, but one ride threatens to trap the townsfolk in their perfect daydreams forever.

A talented young mapmaker who draws imaginary worlds for fun finds her creations bleeding into reality, and with the help of her best friend she must redraw the boundaries before imagination overwrites the real world.

In a kingdom where every person has a living shadow companion, a shy girl with a rebellious shadow must learn to work together with it to stop an eternal eclipse that would freeze both light and darkness.

A dedicated space botanist stationed alone on a remote research outpost cultivates a remarkable plant whose flowers bloom with vivid memories of Earth, helping her realize she is not as alone as she thought when the plant begins calling for others.

A magic apprentice and a science prodigy are forced to collaborate on a school project that accidentally rips open a portal between their two very different academies, and they race to close it before the collision of magic and technology causes chaos.

The granddaughter of a famous storyteller whose spoken tales become real must team up with a sentient storybook to complete her grandmother's unfinished masterpiece and rescue her from being trapped inside her own legend.

In a neon-lit future where majestic dragons are engineered for high-speed aerial races, a scrappy young mechanic and her loyal dragon partner discover a way to free the dragons from their corporate owners and give them true wings to soar.

A gentle beekeeper tending her hives in a small countryside town discovers that her bees carry tiny messages and memories between slightly different versions of her world, becoming an unlikely bridge between realities that need mending.

An elderly lighthouse keeper who has guarded the coast for decades learns that his beacon does more than guide ships — it shepherds lost dreams and wandering spirits safely home, and he must keep it burning during the storm of a lifetime.

A young orchestra conductor discovers her music can physically shape reality, and must conduct the most important performance of her life to prevent a city-wide disaster caused by a rival composer's discordant symphony.

Inside the world's largest floating library, a shy librarian's assistant accidentally releases characters from unfinished stories, and must help them find their endings before the library's pages are permanently rewritten.
A kind-hearted inventor creates tiny mechanical helpers that start developing personalities and emotions, forcing her to decide whether to treat them as tools or as new friends.

In a quiet coastal town, the local lighthouse keeper's daughter discovers that the light attracts not only ships but also people who have lost their way in life, and she begins helping them find their direction.

Two best friends — one who sees the future in dreams and one who remembers the past perfectly — team up when they realize a small decision they made as children is about to change their entire town's future.
A street performer who can make her shadow perform independently of her body uses her unique talent to solve small mysteries and bring wonder back to a neighborhood that has forgotten how to dream.
On a train that travels through different seasons instead of stations, a young traveler must help the conductor repair a broken track before winter overtakes spring forever.
A young gardener discovers that the flowers in her grandmother's overgrown greenhouse can grant temporary wishes, but every wish changes the garden — and she must decide what is truly worth changing.
In a future city where everyone has personal AI companions, a girl whose AI suddenly goes silent must journey into the digital undercity to find out why her friend stopped talking.
A retired mapmaker who once charted imaginary lands is visited by a character from one of his old maps who needs help because his world is starting to disappear.
A group of kids at an old summer camp discover that the lake contains a portal to a world where their camp counselor versions from different timelines exist, and they must work together across time.

A gentle giant who lives alone in the mountains is befriended by a tiny, fearless explorer who convinces him that the world below needs his help protecting a rare and beautiful valley from being forgotten.
